question_placeholder: E.g., Ideas to improve the schoolyard
prepare_session_help: Save the title, number of ideas, votes, and color in a URL so you can reopen them later and launch the activity another time.
start_session_help: Start idea collection right now and generate the code, link, and QR so other people can participate live.
shareable_link_title: Preparation link ready. Copy and save it:
switch_to_participant: Looking to join a session? Click here.
switch_to_presenter: Are you the presenter? Log in here.
completed_subtitle: You can see the results on the main screen.
ideas_left_text: You have {count} idea(s) left to send.
waiting_for_voting: You have sent all your ideas. Waiting for the presenter to start the voting...
submission_paused_subtitle: The presenter has paused idea submissions.
